top_signals.title: Europe Has Means To Be Self-Sufficient, Says AMI Labs CEO
top_signals.summary: Europe has the means to pull ahead in the global AI race by investing in and building more data centres, AMI Labs CEO Alex LeBrun told BTV's Tom Mackenzie at Vivatech 2026 in Paris, France. (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: We have to manage the AI revolution
top_signals.summary: There must be a global agreement on how the technology is controlled

top_signals.title: CISA orders feds to patch max severity Joomla plugin flaw by Friday
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Cybersecurity and Infrastructure Security Agency (CISA) has ordered federal agencies to patch a maximum-severity flaw in the Widget Factory Joomla Content Editor (JCE) plugin that is being actively exploited in the wild. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.
